name: account-dropdown
delta: clicking opens [role=menu] anchored top-start above the button with items: My account, Privacy policy, Share feedback, divider, Sign out. Items highlight data-focus:bg-blue-500 text-white on hover/focus.

name: team-dropdown
delta: opens [role=menu] with: Settings(gear), divider, Catalyst(check,current,avatar), Big Events(avatar BE), divider, New team…(plus). Anchored bottom start below header.

name: mobile-sidebar
delta: on <lg, top navbar shows hamburger; clicking slides a sidebar dialog in from the left over a black/30 backdrop. Close button (X) top-right of panel; click backdrop or X to close.
